goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi. The hotel should be in the centre and should have a star of 0. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 2 nights starting from wednesday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve british food and should be in the expensive price range. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 16:15 on the same day. If the booking fails how about sunday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you help me find a place to stay?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes! What part of town would you like to stay in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would prefer to stay in the South please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 4 nice places to stay in that area, is there a price range you prefer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I've changed my mind and would prefer to stay in the center of town. I need parking, wifi, and it should have a 0 star rating.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There's one guesthouse, el shaddai, that fits your criteria. Do you need more information?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, but I do need a reservation for Wednesday, 2 nights, for 3 people.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Booking was successful. Reference number is : LG6AFLVA.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks. Could you also help me locate an expensive british restaurant?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The Cambridge Chop House sounds like it might be what you are looking for.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That sounds wonderful! Is it in the same area as the hotel?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your hotel is in the south and the cambridge chop house is in the centre, is that okay?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Hmm, I really want to stay near the hotel. Do you have anything in the south instead?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: In the south we do not have any expensive british restaurants. We do have chinese, indian, italian or mexican.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: My hotel is in the centre, so the Cambridge Chop House will actually work. Can you make me a booking for 3 people on Wednesday?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes I can. What time would you like to eat?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I want to eat at 16:15.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Done! Your table will be reserved for 15 minutes. The reference number is 1T0DI06Z. Can I help you with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Oh yeah, I'm going to need a ride to get around.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have booked you a taxi to take from your hotel to The Cambridge Chop House.  Contact number	:	07124495603

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you, what kind of car will be picking me up?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It will be a black Honda. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No. That is all I need for today.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thank you for calling. I hope you enjoy your trip. Goodbye!

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called stazione restaurant and coffee bar. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 4 people at 19:00 on sunday. If the booking fails how about tuesday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should have a star of 4. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free parking. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from the same day. If the booking fails how about saturday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

restaurant.name: cambridge lodge restaurant|stazione restaurant and coffee bar

turns.speaker: user

turns.utterance: Sure, I can do that.  What day and time would you like me to book?

turns.utterance: Okay the booking was successful. Reference number is VKKM9KO1.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks, I am also looking for a place to stay.

turns.utterance: Great, I can help with that. Do you have an area and price range you want?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: in the type of Guesthouse, 4 star rating in the moderate price range, and free parking, i want to book that for the same 7 people, for 2 nights Sunday please

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 9 options here. What area would you prefer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Is there a guesthouse in the center? It would be more convenient near the restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I don't have any guesthouses in that area meeting your requirements. Would you like me to check in a different area?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Sorry forget area, that doesnt matter. Just choose the first option out of the previous 9 you mentioned and book it with the specifications I mentioned earlier.

turns.utterance: The Acorn Guest House meets your criteria. Should I book it for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes. I need it booked for 4 people on sunday and for 2 nights

turns.speaker: system

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It's been my pleasure. Can help with something else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, that is all I need today. Thanks again for all your help! You've been wonderful!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm glad I could be of help. Please contact us again, anytime. Good bye.

Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 16:30 on sunday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type
